title: Bind T1 PM verdicts to the exact PR head SHA in Merge Gate

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Second commit fixes Codex P1 (missing checkout before require, base-SHA-pinned for the same privilege-boundary reason as UTV2-1550). Canonical fix for the gap independently rediscovered as UTV2-1552 (duplicate) while rebasing #1230/#1231/#1232 during this session. Third commit fixes a live Merge Gate self-referential bootstrap gap discovered during this PR's own merge attempt: base.sha never has merge-gate-verdict.cjs since this PR introduces it, so require() threw MODULE_NOT_FOUND on every evaluation. Fixed by recovering the file from the PR's own head SHA only when absent at the base-pinned checkout, preserving the base-pin for every subsequent PR that merely edits the file.

verifier.note: Mechanical checks only. Not independent Griff review, t1-approved, or a pm-verdict/v1 owner artifact.

lint.note: Added a **/*.cjs eslint.config.mjs override (Node globals, CommonJS source type) for this repo's first .cjs file.

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

runtime_proof.note: This lane changes only Merge Gate workflow logic and a pure CommonJS module; no production code path or migration touched. Live smoke run regardless per T1 policy.
